service_items.title: HCU system overhaul and calibration
service_items.description: 64k running hours overhaul scope for HCU system on MAN B&W 6S60ME-C8.2.
work_scope: Overhaul ELFI valve and multiway valve units
Overhaul exhaust valve actuator and fuel oil pressure booster
Overhaul accumulator and refill with nitrogen

service_items.title: MPC system inspection and health check
service_items.description: 64k running hours inspection scope for MPC system on MAN B&W 6S60ME-C8.2.
work_scope: Inspection of MPC status and replacement readiness

spare_parts_items.title: Fuel booster units top covers and suction valves

pending_items: Confirm whether HPS and HCU accumulator repair kits are owner supply or company supply
Confirm whether FIVA valves pilot valves are owner supply or company supply
Confirm whether fuel booster unit top covers and suction valves are owner supply or company supply
Confirm whether exhaust valve actuator safety valves are owner supply or company supply
Confirm whether MPC and UPS batteries are owner supply or company supply
Confirm other consumables and sealing items
Confirm final work location in China central/south area
Confirm high pressure system safety procedure
risks: Waiting for critical spare parts may interrupt execution
Safety approval or hot work restriction may affect schedule
assumptions: Assessment report is for quotation preparation only and not final execution plan
Actual work scope may be adjusted according to onsite condition
